title: Ellisia fremontii

intro: Ellisia fremontii, also known as Fremont's Ellisia or Fremont's ellisia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential to treat various health issues such as sore throats, coughs, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
